{| class="wikitable"
! Type
! style="white-space: nowrap;" | Date
! Summary
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 2017-12-20 22:20:41
| Upgraded vcsmx version from L-2016.06-SP1-1 to L-2016.06-SP2-11 to address post-si bug. Critical fixes: xprop enablement, missed assertions, upf check. @fast(vcsmx) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/resource/1406418729) @detail(https://dtspedia.intel.com/VCS/xprop/xindex)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 2017-12-20 22:20:40
| Upgraded configulate version from 1.0.33.p9 to 1.0.33.p37 to enable -no_overwrite option for configulate xmls. @ddi(configulate) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/resource/1406545588)
|-
|}
